R2-FM-01: trace or shade one equal part in multiple models
identify the whole before selecting the part
R2-FM-02: contrast counting pieces with naming one part
use one out of how many equal parts prompts
revisit R1 equal-part and whole-reference tasks
R2-FM-03: compare the same whole partitioned into different counts
overlay one-half, one-third, and one-fourth models
require predictions before showing the visual
R2-FM-04: connect fair-sharing stories back to models
label each share as one equal part of the whole
use teacher modeling that links fairness to unit meaning
